description: Vietnamese crime gang active in Cabramatta, Sydney, Australia from the mid-1980s to 1999. Formed by Vietnamese refugees, the gang engaged in drug trafficking and extortion. Its name derives from five Vietnamese words starting with T. The gang dissolved after the murder of its leader in 1995 and subsequent power struggles.

country_links.evidence_quote: 5T was a Vietnamese crime gang active in the Cabramatta area of Sydney , Australia in the final two decades of the 20th century.
country_links.context: The 5T gang was active in the Cabramatta area of Sydney, Australia, with members and operations there.
